title: lolbeacon
description: lolbeacon - A beacon soundpack that makes it a little more... retro.
body:
lolbeacon is a very simple resource pack that changes the beacon startup, shutdown, and ambient sounds to the Windows XP startup/shutdown and dial-up sounds.
